assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence:
Plan section 'Branch Operations' step 1: "git checkout TC-9005
git pull

This checks out the **feature branch** TC-9005 (the Target Branch from the task description), NOT `main`."

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan section 'Push and Pull Request': "gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title ..." and explicitly notes "--base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not `main`"

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan section 'Branch Operations' step 2: "git checkout -b TC-9205\n\nThe task branch is named `TC-9205` (the task's Jira issue ID), which is distinct from `TC-9005` (the feature branch / Target Branch)."

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan section 'Pre-Implementation: Code Inspection' explicitly lists all three files: "1. Read `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs`", "2. Read `entity/src/advisory.rs`", "3. Read `migration/src/lib.rs`"

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan section 'Commit Message' shows the commit command: "git commit --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' -m ..."

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: Commit message uses Conventional Commits format: "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" and the footer contains "Implements TC-9205"

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: Plan section 'Target Branch Identification': "The task description contains a **Target Branch** section with value `TC-9005`. This is a feature branch (not `main`), indicating feature-branch workflow. All branch operations and PR targeting must use TC-9005 as the base."
